title: PARA Workspace Architecture & Governance Standards (v1.8.x)
summary: Foundational architecture, governance, and efficiency standards for PARA Workspace v1.8.x. Covers: four-pillar structure (.para/, .agents/), Governing Kernel v1.5.3 (11 Invariants, 10 Heuristics incl. H10 KI), project.md schema v1.6.3 with field-gated I/O and @ecosystem/ path resolution, Ecosystem + Meta-Project types (v1.7.6), two-level Agent Index (workspace + project rules/skills with proactive trigger), Skills system v1.6.4 with /para-skill Co-Author workflow (v1.7.6) and Sidecar Skill pattern (v1.7.6.3), CLI with Smart Archive and catalog.yml governance, SYNC.md cross-project notifications, Knowledge System with platform-injected KI context (v1.7.0+), System KI governed lifecycle with template sync (v1.7.1), KR7 Ephemeral Reference Ban (v1.7.5), i18n docs/locales/ architecture (v1.7.6), orphan directory cleanup in installer (v1.7.6.3), Brainstorm Extract Paradigm with consent gate and 500-line threshold replacing Dual Output (v1.7.12), Brainstorm Sidecar Skill for just-in-time template loading (v1.7.12), VERSIONS.yml centralized version tracking replacing catalog version field (v1.7.13), preferences.date_format for content display dates (v1.7.13), anti-bulk-overwrite convention for governed library versions (v1.7.13), Cognitive Bypass Fix with Soft Dump payload in brainstorm/plan/docs (v1.7.9.1), Anti-Token-Decay Guardrails with HTML Locks, Staged Drill-down, and Git Auto-Run Shield (v1.7.13.2), Content Authoring Ecosystem with /write workflow and write sidecar skill for ebook/paper/tutorial/blog/social/email content types (v1.7.14), /logs session telemetry workflow with Fast Glance and Structured Audit modes (v1.7.14), BUG-32 fix for para-workflow add source metadata default (v1.7.14), Harness Skill with guard catalog (6 types) and auto-scan protocol for context-aware safety guards (v1.7.15), Plan Status Gate enforcing Draft-to-Active lifecycle for implementation plans (v1.7.15), roadmap prefix naming convention for OSSS compliance (v1.7.15), C7 Plan Status Gate sovereignty rule preventing Agent from mutating plan Status or active_plan without user confirmation (v1.7.16), /spec workflow and spec sidecar skill for specification-driven development (v1.7.16), Proactive Guard Scan for CHECKPOINT items in plan phases (v1.7.16), Dynamic Tool System with install-tool/remove-tool/list-tools CLI commands and tool registry (v1.8.0), Tool Registry (registry/tools.yml) for centralized plugin management (v1.8.0), auto-generated wrapper scripts with Dev/Prod fallback routing (v1.8.0), para-graph as first tool plugin PoC (v1.8.0), Tool Intelligence Installer with manifest-declared AI intelligence via agents: block in tool.manifest.yml (v1.8.1), install-tool --agents/--no-agents flags for selective intelligence installation (v1.8.1), remove-tool agents cleanup detecting and offering removal of bundled intelligence (v1.8.1), tool.schema.json extended with agents property for schema validation (v1.8.1), MCP Auto-Setup with mcp: block in tool.manifest.yml and mcp-setup/mcp-list/mcp-remove CLI commands (v1.8.2), IDE config path matrix for Antigravity/Claude/Cursor with jq-based JSON merge and print fallback (v1.8.2), 2-Tier Dev/Prod path resolution for MCP config (v1.8.2), shared mcp-config.sh library with 6 functions (v1.8.2), install-tool --no-mcp flag for selective MCP skip (v1.8.2), Graph Router Sync with sidecar skills referencing centralized para-graph §3.3.x instead of inline graph logic (v1.8.3), detail-plan-docs.md template for graph-enhanced doc generation (v1.8.3), para-graph trigger in skills.md index (v1.8.3), Plan Template Governance Checklist with auto-generated review items from project indices (v1.8.4), Hybrid Hook Architecture with install-hooks.sh lifecycle hooks and --sync flag for decoupled tool intelligence updates (v1.8.5), Engine-Aligned Versioning with shipped_in and min_engine_version additive manifest fields (v1.8.5), Consumer vs Contributor update mode with git fetch+reset for Windows NTFS file lock avoidance (v1.8.5), semver_gte POSIX utility for version guards (v1.8.5), and token optimization patterns. Covers 30 core commands, 12 rules, and 11 skills.
